name: Don's Piquant Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the olive oil, cider vinegar, basil vinegar, black pepper, Romano cheese, garlic, and chives.
2. Stir in the plain yogurt and tabasco sauce until well mixed.
3. Allow the dressing to chill for 1-3 hours before using.
4. Before serving, shake the dressing well to ensure all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
